name: infamous-freight
description: Infamous Freight — The freight dispatch platform built by truckers, for truckers

scripts.build: npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.lint: cd apps/api && npm run lint && cd ../web && npm run lint
scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const apiDir='apps/api'; const apiPackageJson=apiDir + '/package.json'; if(!fs.existsSync(apiDir) || !fs.statSync(apiDir).isDirectory()){console.error('Missing apps/api workspace directory'); process.exit(1)} if(!fs.existsSync(apiPackageJson)){console.error('Missing apps/api/package.json'); process.exit(1)}" && cd apps/api && npm run test -- --runInBand
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd apps/api && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:seed: cd apps/api && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:setup: npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run prisma:seed
